itemDesc: A blood component used to treat wounded soldiers on the battlefield.
A soldier that has been critically wounded on the battlefield. Deliver this soldier to a Hospital to recover Soldier Supplies.
Used by medics to heal other soldiers.
Supplies for maintaining structures. Store at Bases or Maintenance Tunnels to prevent decay on surrounding structures.
Used by medics to revive wounded soldiers.
A wounded player, [PlayerNameHere]. Drop this soldier off at a safe location for medical aid.
